question: A company tracks average website sign-ups per year. According to the chart, which statement about the latest year is most appropriate?

options.A: The latest year clearly has the lowest full-year sign-ups of the entire period.
options.B: The latest year proves that sign-ups are now permanently declining.
options.C: From this chart, we cannot draw firm conclusions about the latest year’s full-year trend because it only shows data up to April 1, 2024.
options.D: The latest year already shows a sharp full-year decline compared to previous years.

explanation: The latest year in the chart only includes about 2 months of data, while previous years show full 12‑month totals. Comparing the partial-year value (493 sign-ups) directly to full-year values like 2,822 sign-ups creates the illusion of a sharp decline. We cannot draw full‑year conclusions from this incomplete aggregate.
